parents.subject: LU-19321 efalnd: support users to specify cpt of EFA

commit.subject: LU-19340 mdt: avoid direct claim on tgt_checksum_niobuf_t10pi
commit.message:
LU-19340 mdt: avoid direct claim on tgt_checksum_niobuf_t10pi

tgt_checksum_niobuf_t10pi causes direct reclaim and MDT hangs.
Use GFP_NOFS to allocate the pages and avoid filesystem re-entry
during allocation.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sohei Koyama <skoyama@ddn.com>
Fixes: b1e7be00cb ("LU-10472 osc: add T10PI support for RPC checksum")
Change-Id: I10c2fffbe4459b4c9f1c9e92db934d21be1a36af
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61208
Reviewed-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
